task_description: Enhance the sleep audio pipeline with advanced error handling (specific Catch blocks for Lambda/Polly/DynamoDB errors), retry policies (exponential backoff on key tasks), and observability improvements (X-Ray tracing, structured logging, CloudWatch Alarms). Following strict TDD approach.

verification.summary: All 148 tests pass (127 existing + 16 original new + 5 review-fix tests). cdk synth succeeds for dev/stage/prod. Fixed review issues: (1) States.ALL fallback catch on ProcessAudio, (2) NormalizeCaughtError/NormalizeValidationError Pass states to normalize payloads before PublishFailedNotification, (3) States.ALL fallback catch on PollyTask.
